chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1559 of 2022 Before:- Mr. Justice Muhammad Shafi Siddiqui Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah Date of hearing & Order: 31.05.2022 Mr. Ali Hassan Chandio, advocate for petitioners Mr. Muhammad Humayoon Khan DAG a/w Khurram Shahzad Additional Director General (Law) ECP, Saleemuddin Dal District Election Commissioner Tharparkar, Prem Chand Additional D.C Mirpurkhas, Roshan Ali Jatoi DEC Mirpurkhas, Masood A. Qureshi REC Mirpurkhas, Lutuf Ali Mastoi E.O Umerkot, Muhammad Saleem Shaikh AC Shujaabad, Muhammad Yousuf Majeedano DEC Hyderabad and Ali Abdullah Khalid REC Hyderabad Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman, Law Officer NADRA Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant A.G Sindh *** O R D E R This petition concerns with the delimitation of Deh-272, UC-36 Taluka Kot Ghulam Muhammad District Mirpurkhas. Through Objection Petitions No.31 to 39 of 2022 the petitioners, as being objectors, have raised objections and submitted site plan of the wards viz-a-viz population as defined therein; however, in a cursory and slipshod manner the Delimitation Authority Mirpurkhas has rejected the delimitation objections and hence the petition is covered by the judgment passed in the case of Zulfiqar Ali Malik versus The Election Commission of Pakistan & Others (C.P No.D-328 of 2022) by a Division Bench of this Court at Sukkur. 2. In view of the above, this petition is allowed to the extent of findings and conclusion as drawn by the Division Bench of this Court at para-21(ii), (iv) & (vi) of the above referred judgment. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
